report: Codex执政官交付控制面与收口不可回归修复报告-2026-07-19.md

failed_or_downgraded.reason: HTTP 404 from current extractor; reproducibility claim kept at GitHub line-ending and local build evidence, not promoted from this URL.

claims.claim: GitHub recommends draft -> upload all assets -> publish for immutable releases.
Artifact attestations bind an artifact to workflow, repository, commit and event; reusable workflows can support stronger SLSA build guarantees.
Reusable workflows use workflow_call and same-repository calls can resolve to the caller commit.

MCP hosts establish client/server connections, negotiate capabilities during initialization, and discover tools through tools/list; updating a local server is not equivalent to hot-replacing an existing host connection.
Repository-level .gitattributes is the stable way to control line endings across contributors; setup.cmd needs explicit CRLF.

uncertainty: GitHub Actions and API outages remain external transient failures.
Codex Desktop host refresh and provider login are local user-session boundaries.
Artifact attestations are researched and planned but not yet enabled in this PR.
